title: gladiolus nerineoides
intro: Gladiolus nerineoides, commonly known as the Cape lily or autumn lily, is a plant species in the family Iridaceae. It is a perennial bulbous plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Gladiolus nerineoides is typically used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which can be applied topically or taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
